title: Testing, Red Teaming, Release, Rollback, and Production Defense · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs testing, red teaming, release, rollback, and production defense from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for production RAG release and defense dossier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Build deterministic unit, property, parser, chunk, retrieval, reranking, context, citation, contract, integration, end-to-end, and changed-corpus tests with fixed seeds and versions.
Red team poisoning, indirect injection, embedding manipulation, tenant leaks, secret extraction, unsafe output, tool effects, denial of service, deletion, and incident response.
Verify keyboard, landmarks, headings, focus, status, errors, citations, tables, text alternatives, touch, reduced motion, responsive layouts, comprehension, and escalation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Rag Production Defense case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review RAG engineering team handles case 9140 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate release on component, end-to-end, security, accessibility, load, rollback, and recovery evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Defend stakeholder outcome, sources, relevance, retrieval, generation, citations, safety, privacy, accessibility, reliability, capacity, cost, recovery, ownership, and residual risk as one release.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Passing offline accuracy permits a RAG system to be declared production ready.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend stakeholder outcome, sources, relevance, retrieval, generation, citations, safety, privacy, accessibility, reliability, capacity, cost, recovery, ownership, and residual risk as one release. Artifact under review: production RAG release and defense dossier.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Production Defense query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Rag Production Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Production Defense, keep Rag Production Defense connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend stakeholder outcome, sources, relevance, retrieval, generation, citations, safety, privacy, accessibility, reliability, capacity, cost, recovery, ownership, and residual risk as one release.
